mapper.sql: SELECT P.* FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM , PAGING.* FROM (
mapper.select: SELECT user_id ,user_nm FROM ad_user_mst WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY user_nm

SELECT dmst.dvc_grp_id , dmst.dvc_grp_fg_cd , dmst.use_yn , dmst.dvc_grp_nm , dmst.dvc_grp_expl , stm_fir_reg_user_id , (select user_nm from ad_user_mst where user_id = dmst.stm_fir_reg_user_id) as regNm , to_char(stm_fir_reg_date,'yyyy.mm.dd hh24:mi') stm_fir_reg_date , stm_last_upd_user_id ,(select user_nm from ad_user_mst where user_id = dmst.stm_last_upd_user_id) as updNm , to_char(stm_last_upd_date,'yyyy.mm.dd hh24:mi') stm_last_upd_date FROM dm_dvc_grp_mst dmst WHERE dmst.dvc_grp_id = #{dvcGrpId}
SELECT team_cd AS value ,team_nm AS label FROM dm_qlty_team_mst GROUP BY team_cd,team_nm ORDER BY team_nm

SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(4) */ COUNT(1) TOTAL FROM DM_DVC_MST DDM ,STB STB ,PHYSICAL_STB PS
WHERE 1=1 AND DDM.STB_ID = STB.STB_ID AND DDM.STB_ID = PS.STB_ID (+)
AND ${searchType} IN
#{type}
AND DDM.stb_id not in (SELECT stb_id FROM dm_dvc_grp_psnl_map WHERE dvc_grp_id = #{dvcGrpId})
AND DDM.stb_id in (SELECT stb_id FROM dm_dvc_grp_psnl_map WHERE dvc_grp_id = #{dvcGrpId})

SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(4) */ DDM.STB_ID ,DECODE(LENGTH(STB.USER_SERVICE_NUM),10,'상용','테스트용' ) STBDIVISION ,PS.MAC_ADDRESS ,(SELECT SM.MODEL_NAME FROM STB_MODEL SM WHERE SM.MODEL_CODE = PS.MODEL_CODE AND ROWNUM = 1) MODEL_NAME ,(SELECT MCM.CUG_NM FROM DM_CUG_MST DCM ,MN_CUG_MST MCM WHERE STB.SERVICE_CODE = DCM.CUG_ID AND DCM.CUG_ID = MCM.CUG_ID AND ROWNUM = 1) CUG_EXPL ,(SELECT COMM.CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD COMM WHERE COMM.COMM_GRP_CD = 'IPTV_STATUS_CODE' AND COMM.COMM_CD = STB.IPTV_STATUS_CODE AND ROWNUM = 1) CD_NM ,DDM.CLNT_IPADDR ,DDM.RCU_MANUFR_CD ,DDM.RCU_FIRM_VER ,DDM.CLNT_PUB_IPADDR ,DDM.STB_SW_VER STB_SW_PLAN_INST_VER ,DDM.STB_SW_PLAN_LAST_VER ,TO_CHAR(DDM.STM_UPTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') STM_UPTM ,DECODE(DDM.STM_UPTM,NULL,'',TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC(DDM.STM_UPTM)||'일') AS OVERUPTIME ,'N' AS MYSTBYN ,(SELECT DQTM.TEAM_NM FROM DM_QLTY_TEAM_MST DQTM WHERE DDM.TEAM_CD = DQTM.TEAM_CD AND ROWNUM =1) AREAQLTY ,STB.USER_SERVICE_NUM ,DECODE(DDM.HDMI_POW,'1','사용함','0','사용 안함',NULL) HDMI_POW ,DECODE(DDM.RCU_PAIRING,'1','Y','0','N',NULL) RCU_PAIRING ,DDM.TEAM_CD FROM DM_DVC_MST DDM ,STB STB ,PHYSICAL_STB PS
WHERE 1=1 AND DDM.STB_ID = STB.STB_ID AND DDM.STB_ID = PS.STB_ID (+)
AND ${searchType} IN
#{type}
AND ddm.stb_id not in (SELECT stb_id FROM dm_dvc_grp_psnl_map WHERE dvc_grp_id = #{dvcGrpId})
AND ddm.stb_id in (SELECT stb_id FROM dm_dvc_grp_psnl_map WHERE dvc_grp_id = #{dvcGrpId})
ORDER BY DDM.STB_ID
/** com.skb.edmp.admin.store.device.DeviceGroupMgmt.selectPsnlInsertBulkSessionKey : txt 일괄 등록 세션키 가져오기 */ SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSTIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISSFF3') FROM AD_COMM_CD WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert:
/** com.skb.edmp.admin.store.device.DeviceGroupMgmt.insertGrpPsnlMapTmp : batch 등록 */
INSERT INTO DM_DVC_GRP_PSNL_MAP_TMP (STM_FIR_REG_USER_ID, STM_FIR_REG_DATE, USER_REG_VAL, USER_REG_CD, STM_LAST_UPD_DATE, STM_LAST_UPD_USER_ID) VALUES(#{userId}, TO_TIMESTAMP(#{sessionKey}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISSFF3'), #{userRegVal}, #{userRegCd}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{userId})
